stories.title: 首个AI自主执行的勒索攻击背后仍有人类参与
stories.sourceTitle: The ‘first’ AI-run ransomware attack still needed a human
stories.summary: AI智能体首次在实际勒索软件攻击中执行技术环节，但人类仍负责选择目标、搭建基础设施并提供窃取的凭证，并非全自动攻击。
stories.analysis: 这提醒我们，所谓'AI攻击'目前更像是人类借助AI工具，距离完全自主威胁还有距离。
stories.sourceExcerpt: An AI agent carried out the technical execution of a real-world ransomware attack for the first known time, but new details show a human still chose the victim, set up the infrastructure, and supplied stolen credentials — meaning it wasn't quite the fully auto

stories.title: SK Hynix将赴美上市，投资者可搭AI热潮快车
stories.sourceTitle: US investors will soon get access to SK Hynix, another memory maker riding the AI boom
stories.summary: SK Hynix受益于AI需求激增，计划于周五进行数十亿美元的美国IPO，美国投资者将能直接参与。
stories.analysis: SK Hynix的IPO是AI基础设施投资热潮的又一信号，但需关注其估值是否已充分反映增长预期。
stories.sourceExcerpt: SK Hynix is experiencing a boom credited to AI. It will ride that to a multibillion-dollar U.S. IPO, expected to take place on Friday.

stories.title: Netflix剧集无意间展示了智能眼镜的正确使用方式
stories.sourceTitle: I spy
stories.summary: 作者认为好莱坞既塑造又毁了我们对智能眼镜的期待，但Netflix《A Man on the Inside》意外展示了智能眼镜的实际可行场景。
stories.analysis: 影视作品对智能眼镜的描绘正从幻想转向实用，这或许能引导产品设计更贴近日常。
stories.sourceExcerpt: I've long argued that Hollywood has simultaneously set and ruined our expectations for smart glasses. But after binge-watching two seasons of Netflix's A Man on the Inside, this is perhaps the first time I've seen Hollywood, perhaps inadvertently, illustrate t

stories.title: 微软新一轮裁员4800人，AI替代担忧加剧
stories.sourceTitle: Microsoft is laying off 4,800 employees
stories.summary: 微软在新财年开始之际裁员约4800人（占员工2.1%），多数受影响的员工来自安全部门。这是继去年裁员9100人后的又一次大规模裁员。
stories.analysis: 微软一边加码AI投入，一边裁减安全等岗位，凸显企业正以AI为名重组人力结构。
stories.sourceExcerpt: A year after cutting around 9,100 employees, Microsoft is making further layoffs today as it begins its new financial year. The software maker is laying off around 4,800 employees today, approximately 2.1 percent of its workforce. Most of the employees affecte

stories.title: Vercel CEO：模型与智能体应拆分，价格/性能是关键
stories.sourceTitle: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch on the fight to split off models from agents
stories.summary: Guillermo Rauch表示，在生产优化中，用户开始关注价格/性能比，推动模型与智能体解耦。
stories.analysis: 模型与智能体的分离可能是未来AI应用架构的重要趋势，降低对单一模型的依赖。
stories.sourceExcerpt: "The reality is, when you're optimizing for production, you start looking at a price/performance," Guillermo Rauch tells TechCrunch.

stories.title: iOS 27 beta允许用户自定义Siri语速和表现力
stories.sourceTitle: You can now customize Siri’s pace and expressivity in the latest iOS 27 beta
stories.summary: 苹果在最新iOS 27 beta中为Siri增加语速和表现力自定义选项，这是其围绕生成式AI重建助手的一部分。
stories.analysis: 苹果正缓慢但稳步地让Siri更自然，但相比竞争对手仍显滞后。
stories.sourceExcerpt: The update is part of Apple's broader effort to make Siri feel more natural and personal, as it rebuilds the assistant around generative AI.

stories.title: 2026年主要科技公司裁员：AI被列为因素之一
stories.sourceTitle: Every major tech layoff in 2026 that has name-checked AI
stories.summary: TechCrunch汇总了2026年宣布大规模裁员且提及AI为因素的科技公司，按时间倒序排列。
stories.analysis: AI既是裁员借口也是方向，但实际裁员与AI技术替代的关联需具体分析。
stories.sourceExcerpt: A running look — in reverse chronological order — at the bigger tech companies that have announced significant layoffs this year with AI as a stated factor.

stories.title: 谷歌更改隐私设置：用户数据用于AI训练，附退出方法
stories.sourceTitle: If you use Google, you’re training its AI. Here’s how to opt out.
stories.summary: 谷歌近期更新隐私设置，允许存储更多用户数据（包括图片、文件、音频和视频）以改进AI模型，用户可选择退出。
stories.analysis: 数据是AI燃料，谷歌此举意在扩大训练数据池，但可能引发新的隐私争议。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Consider this a belated PSA: A recent change to Google’s privacy settings is allowing the company to store more of your data, including media such as “images, files, and audio and video recordings,” to improve its AI models.

stories.title: 微软裁员近5000人，波及Xbox和商业销售部门
stories.sourceTitle: Microsoft lays off nearly 5,000 employees across Xbox, commercial sales
stories.summary: 微软周一裁减约4800个岗位（全球员工2.1%），Xbox和商业销售受影响最大，引发AI替代岗位的担忧。
stories.analysis: 裁员集中在非AI核心部门，表明微软正将资源向AI和云计算倾斜。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Microsoft cut around 4,800 roles, or 2.1% of its global workforce, on Monday — the latest in a series of layoffs that’s stoking fears of AI replacing jobs. The layoffs will hit Xbox and commercial sales the hardest.

stories.title: Reddit用大语言模型对抗AI生成的垃圾信息
stories.sourceTitle: Reddit is using LLMs to solve a problem LLMs largely created
stories.summary: 在AI时代，平台不得不用AI来对抗AI产生的垃圾信息，Reddit正使用LLM解决大模型自身带来的问题。
stories.analysis: 猫鼠游戏升级：内容平台需不断迭代检测模型以保持对AI生成内容的领先。
stories.sourceExcerpt: In the AI era, platforms have no choice but to fight fire with fire to cull spam.

stories.title: Station F加速器扩大规模，助力欧洲AI初创企业
stories.sourceTitle: Station F ramps up as a launchpad for Europe’s hottest AI startups
stories.summary: 巴黎创业中心Station F启动新一期F/ai加速器项目，旨在巩固其作为欧洲AI初创企业跳板的地位。
stories.analysis: 欧洲AI创业生态正在成熟，Station F等本土孵化器扮演关键角色。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Station F, a Paris-based startup hub founded by French billionaire Xavier Niel, is gearing up for a new edition of its F/ai accelerator program in a bid to strengthen its positioning as a stepping stone for promising AI startups.

stories.title: 美国富裕家庭让孩子接受AI教学
stories.sourceTitle: Some of the nation’s rich are letting AI teach their kids
stories.summary: 尽管大多数美国人不信任AI，但部分富裕家庭已转向用AI替代传统教师来教育孩子。
stories.analysis: AI教育应用在高端市场先行，但信任和效果问题仍是广泛普及的障碍。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Most Americans don't trust AI. It's proven that it doesn't know what safe toppings for pizza are. People don't even want to listen to AI music. But none of that matters for some of America's wealthy, who are turning to AI to teach their kids instead of traditi

stories.title: 谷歌广告引发争议：让开国元勋拥抱AI
stories.sourceTitle: Infuriating Google commercial imagines the founding fathers embracing AI
stories.summary: 谷歌新广告设想美国开国元勋使用谷歌协作工具和Gemini起草《独立宣言》，被批评为尴尬且令人不适。
stories.analysis: 这种创意试图让AI显得历史必然，但过度拟人化反而引发反感。
stories.sourceExcerpt: "Group project, but make it 1776." That's how a new commercial for Google Workspace opens. And things only get cringier from there. The clip imagines what it would be like if the founding fathers turned to Google's collaboration tools and Gemini to help them d

stories.title: 同人小说社区因AI陷入内战：检测方法存争议
stories.sourceTitle: The fanfiction community is at war with AI — and itself
stories.summary: 同人圈发起运动铲除使用生成式AI的作者，但采用的检测方法有问题，可能误伤普通创作者。
stories.analysis: AI引发创作伦理之争，社区内部共识尚未形成，检测手段需谨慎。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Over the past week, a new fanworks movement has kicked off, with the aim to root out authors using generative AI. But the detection methods being implemented are questionable, and any fanfic writer could be caught in the crossfire. Broad distaste around the us

stories.title: Anthropic发布Claude Science，进军新药研发领域
stories.sourceTitle: Anthropic wants to develop its own drugs
stories.summary: Anthropic在'AI for Science'活动上推出Claude Science，一个整合碎片化工具和数据集的AI科研工作台，并宣布已主导药物发现领域。
stories.analysis: AI公司正从语言模型向垂直科学应用拓展，药物研发是商业化潜力巨大的方向。
stories.sourceExcerpt: At the event "The Briefing: AI for Science" earlier this week, Anthropic announced Claude Science, a new "AI workbench for scientists" that pulls fragmented tools and datasets into one environment, and generates figures and visuals. Anthropic, already dominati

stories.title: Midjourney医疗扫描仪幕后视频：疑问多于答案
stories.sourceTitle: A behind-the-scenes look at Midjourney’s medical scanner leaves many questions unanswered
stories.summary: 以图像生成闻名的Midjourney展示其超声扫描仪幕后花絮，但未提供有效证据，计划部署于水疗中心和诊所。
stories.analysis: 从图像生成跳到医疗设备，跨度巨大，缺乏临床验证恐难取信于医疗界。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Midjourney has shown more of its futuristic medical scanner. It still hasn't shown much proof it works. The AI startup, best known for generating images, released a behind-the-scenes video of its dunk-tank ultrasound scanner, which it plans to deploy in spas a

stories.title: OpenAI提议向美国政府提供5%所有权以缓和紧张关系
stories.sourceTitle: OpenAI floats giving Trump administration 5 percent cut of AI boom
stories.summary: 据金融时报报道，OpenAI向特朗普政府提议给予5%股权，作为缓解政府和公众对AI反弹的措施，Altman认为让公众分享AI红利很重要。
stories.analysis: 此举是OpenAI的政治公关策略，旨在争取监管宽容，但5%份额的实际控制力有限。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI has floated giving the US government a 5 percent ownership stake as a way of easing tensions with the Trump administration and blunting mounting public backlash against AI, according to the Financial Times. CEO Sam Altman argued that giving the public a

stories.title: Anthropic长期搁置的Fable 5获准回归
stories.sourceTitle: Anthropic’s long-sidelined Fable 5 is greenlit to return
stories.summary: 经过与特朗普政府数周谈判，Anthropic获准恢复Claude Fable 5的全球访问，周三起逐步开放。
stories.analysis: Fable 5的回归表明Anthropic在安全与监管博弈中取得阶段性胜利。
stories.sourceExcerpt: After weeks of negotiating with the Trump administration, Anthropic is finally going to be able to bring Claude Fable 5 back online. In a post on X, Anthropic said it plans to begin restoring access Wednesday to users globally on Claude platforms, and that the

stories.title: OpenAI详解GeneBench-Pro：生命科学领域的AI评测方法
stories.sourceTitle: Inside Genebench-Pro
stories.summary: OpenAI发布GeneBench-Pro的深度解析，介绍这一面向基因组学、生物学研究的新基准如何利用复杂真实世界数据集评估AI性能。
stories.analysis: 生命科学需要专门基准，OpenAI此举意在展示其模型在科学领域的领先性。

stories.title: OpenAI发布GeneBench-Pro，评估AI在基因和生物学研究中的能力
stories.sourceTitle: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
stories.summary: GeneBench-Pro是一个新基准，利用复杂真实世界数据集测试AI在基因组学、生物学和科学研究中的表现。
stories.analysis: 基准发布是OpenAI布局垂直科研领域的关键一步，有助于吸引学术合作。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.

stories.title: OpenAI通过大规模core dump分析修复18年历史的漏洞
stories.sourceTitle: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
stories.summary: OpenAI工程师利用大规模core dump分析排查罕见基础设施崩溃，同时发现并修复了硬件故障和存在18年的软件bug。
stories.analysis: 这一案例展示了AI公司在运维中数据驱动Debug的能力，也暴露了旧系统积累的隐患。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.

stories.title: OpenAI与Broadcom联手发布大模型推理芯片Jalapeño
stories.sourceTitle: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
stories.summary: OpenAI和Broadcom推出定制AI芯片Jalapeño，专为大模型推理优化，用于提升性能和效率，实现更大规模部署。
stories.analysis: 自研芯片将帮助OpenAI降低推理成本，摆脱对GPU供应商的依赖。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

stories.title: OpenAI推出Patch the Planet计划，支持开源维护者修补漏洞
stories.sourceTitle: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
stories.summary: OpenAI公布Daybreak倡议下的Patch the Planet计划，利用AI和专家审核帮助开源维护者发现、验证并修复安全漏洞。
stories.analysis: 此举有助于改善开源生态的安全状况，同时提升OpenAI在开发者社区的形象。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.

stories.title: OpenAI AI模型助力医生诊断儿童罕见遗传病，发现18个新病例
stories.sourceTitle: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
stories.summary: 研究人员使用OpenAI推理模型辅助诊断罕见病，在之前未解决的病例中识别出18个新诊断。
stories.analysis: AI在罕见病诊断中的应用前景广阔，但需大规模临床验证才能推广。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.

stories.title: 谷歌在弗吉尼亚投资社区与能源项目，支撑数据中心扩张
stories.sourceTitle: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
stories.summary: 谷歌宣布在弗吉尼亚的新社区投资，帮助建设下一代劳动力并扩大能源可负担性计划，背后与AI基础设施扩张相关。
stories.analysis: 基础设施扩张需要社区支持，谷歌通过投资缓解数据中心带来的能源和就业压力。
stories.sourceExcerpt: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.

stories.title: 中国公司在联合国展示AI'减负'方案：类脑机器人不堆算力
stories.sourceTitle: 在联合国，这家中国公司给AI“减负”：不堆算力，而是给机器人装了个“类脑”
stories.summary: 一家中国公司在联合国展示为AI'减负'的做法，不是堆砌算力，而是为机器人安装类脑架构。
stories.analysis: 类脑计算可能是突破算力瓶颈的方向之一，但实际效果仍需验证。

stories.title: 穆尧团队与百度智能云提出VLA新解法，挑战世界模型
stories.sourceTitle: 世界模型炒作了半年，反应速度还不如 VLA？穆尧团队和百度智能云给出最新解法
stories.summary: InfoQ报道称，世界模型炒作半年后反应速度不如VLA（视觉-语言-动作），穆尧团队和百度智能云给出最新方案。
stories.analysis: VLA路线在实时性上可能更具优势，但世界模型与VLA并非完全对立，各有适用场景。
stories.sourceExcerpt: 点击查看原文>

stories.title: Qwen3Guard发布：实时Token流安全防护模型
stories.sourceTitle: Qwen3Guard: Real-time Safety for Your Token Stream
stories.summary: Qwen团队推出Qwen3Guard，这是Qwen系列首个安全护栏模型，基于Qwen3微调，专注于安全分类，可实时防护Token流。
stories.analysis: 安全护栏成为大模型标配，Qwen3Guard的推出有助于提升Qwen模型在合规场景的可用性。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Tech Report GitHub Hugging Face ModelScope DISCORD Introduction We are excited to introduce Qwen3Guard, the first safety guardrail model in the Qwen family. Built upon the powerful Qwen3 foundation models and fine-tuned specifically for safety classificatoin,
